operator.description: A logical operator to compare the `field` against the `value`. One of `less_than`, `less_than_or_equals`, `equals`, `greater_than_or_equals`, `greater_than`.

value.description: The monitor's `current_ledger_account_balance_state.triggered` will be `true` when comparing the `field` to this integer value using the `operator` is logically true.
